title: Past Events
content: Past Events Report: Panchayat Visit and Swachhta Awareness Drive at Chausa Village, 02 October, 2024 Carrier Guidance & E-Resource Management Event at GSSS Domehar, 27 September, 2024 Environmental Sustainability Initiative: "Ek Ped Maa Ke Naam" Tree Plantation Drive: 16 September, 2024 Community Support Initiative: Enhancing Comfort and Facilities at Waknaghat and Chausa Panchayats: 23 August, 2024 Anti Tobacco Campaign, 17 April 2024 Electoral Literacy Campaign, 14-17 March 2024 VOCAL FOR LOCAL 2.0: November 1, 2023 to November 3, 2023 Tree Plantation Drive in Domehar Village, 2nd October, 2023, Visit to Bisa Village- Interaction and Identification of their Issues: 25 September, 2023 Unnat Bharat Abhiyan Team's Participation in Independence Day: 15 August, 2023 Visit to Wakna Village- Interaction and Identification of their Issues: 20 August, 2023 Promoting of "vocal for local": 27-29 April, 2023 Chawsha Village Visit: 22 April, 2023 Computer Literacy programme for village students in JUIT: 14 January - 05 February, 2023 FIELD VISIT TO WAKNA VILLAGE: 18 November, 2022 ELECTION AWARENESS CAMPAIGN THROUGH NUKKAD NATAK: 09 November, 2022 DOOR TO DOOR VILLAGE SURVEY (WAKNA VILLAGE): 05 October, 2022 Women's Empowerment and Hygiene Awareness program in chhausha village: 28 August, 2022 TREE PLANTATION DRIVE: 15 August 2022 75th Independence Day at Wakna Panchayat Gram Sabha: 15 Aug, 2022 HAR GHAR TIRANGA CAMPAIGN by UBA Team: 12 Aug, 2022 Various Gram Sabha Discussion-2018, 2019 & 2022 World Environment Day celebrations, JUIT organized a joint cleanliness Drive by NCC and UBA (Unnat Bharat Abhiyan) Team: June 05, 2022 Richanna Visit to interact with villager about water issues: May 27, 2022 Gram Sabha Visit: 1 May, 2022 Awareness on Water Conservation (Jal Jeewan Mission): April 23, 2022 AIDS Awareness Campaign : April 17, 2022 Cleanliness and Waste Management Awareness Campaign: April 17, 2022 AWARENESS CAMPAIGN: 7 Dec-14 Dec, 2021 Farmer workshop organised by UBA in collarboration of DEST project : 02-11 Dec 2019 Richhana & Dumehar Village Visit for survey and no plastic campaign in School: Oct 02, 2019 Chawsa School and Village Visit to increase awareness and survey: October 02, 2019 No Plastic campaign and household survey: 21 Sept, 2019 MOTIVATIONAL SEMINAR: 02 March, 2019 NO PLASTIC CAMPAIGN Drug abuse awareness in school and village through rally and Nukkadd Natak (2018) Recommendation Letter UBA: April 16, 2018 UBA CALENDER UBA Intimation to DC office: April 16, 2018
